mapper.sql: select id, customer_id, ref_category68_id, parent_id, category68_code, category68_name, name_pinyin, del_flag, del_by, del_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from sb_customer_category68
mapper.select: where customer_id = #{customerId} and (del_flag is null or del_flag != 1) order by parent_id, ref_category68_id
select ref_category68_id from sb_customer_category68 where customer_id = #{customerId} and (del_flag is null or del_flag != 1)
mapper.update: update sb_customer_category68 set name_pinyin = #{namePinyin}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id} and customer_id = #{customerId}
